name: =[Civilian: Taunt]=
description:
"Alright broskie, just don't blame me when you get hurt."

This is Series I promise to fully do.

Die of dead series baby.

This won't follow canon stuff and will be filled with more original stuff and my own world.

Here's a fun fact for this series. Each character is connected to another. Here's the list.

[Hotdog and Taunt.]

[Caretaker and Carepad.]

[Loveshot and Revolver.]

[Banana and Cloak.]

[Block and YOU]

Each of them are connected in some way or another. The order is also the same, as I'll release Hotdog and then start on Caretaker!
